name: Hickenlooper 2020
subject: BREAKING: New polling shows our opponent is one of the most unpopular Senators in all of America today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
**BREAKING NEWS:** New, independent polling from Morning Consult just named our opponent, Cory Gardner, one of the most unpopular Senators in all of America today. _That 's huge, folks!_ It proves again that the people of Colorado are sick and tired of Gardner standing with Trump and McConnell instead of doing what's right. On top of that, analysis released this week named Gardner one of the most vulnerable Republican Senators in 2020 -- suggesting that our campaign remains the best chance Democrats have to flip a Senate seat. The most important thing we can do in response to this news is work even harder to build our campaign, which is why we're asking: **Will you make a donation to John Hickenlooper 's campaign before tonight's mid-month fundraising deadline? Anything you pitch in will go a long way toward helping us defeat Gardner:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200117-unpopular?refcode=em-200117-full&amount=10&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

name: Gary
subject: reaching out (urgent)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
he outraised us again

---
| |
---
Friend: I've got nowhere else to turn. My right-wing opponent announced he outraised us again. Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell are funneling millions into Michigan to prop up my opponent and defeat me - **and if they're successful, Democrats will have zero chance of taking back the Senate.**
So I'm reaching out for your help - but before I ask, I'd like to explain why the stakes of our race are so incredibly high.
If we lose, Democrats will throw away our only chance of taking back the Senate. That means two more years of Mitch McConnell calling the shots in Washington. That means he and Donald Trump will team up to put more extremist justices like Brett Kavanaugh on the Supreme Court, and you can bet they'll keep trying to dismantle protections for those with preexisting conditions.
I've won tough elections before, and I'm ready to fight tooth and nail to win again. But polling shows me tied with my opponent, and right now, dark money GOP groups are spending more to defeat me than any other in-cycle Democratic senator in the entire country.
**So here's the hard and simple truth: Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says Democrats can take back the Senate, but only if we first win in Michigan.**
Those are the stakes. And with the future of the Senate on the line, in a race this close, every dollar could be the difference between winning and losing.
After we were outraised, a group of donors stepped up to match all donations that came in yesterday. But we still fell short of our goal last night. Thankfully, they extended that match opportunity, but only until midnight tonight. As of right now, we're still $5,218 short of what we need to win. If you're like me, you don't want to wake up on Election Day wishing you'd done more to take back the Senate.
So now I'm asking: Will you pitch in to help us win here in Michigan and take back the Senate for Democrats by giving $3 or more now? I'd really appreciate it. Every dollar will be doubled until midnight using this link: [**https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email**](https://secure.petersformichigan.%3D%3D/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk254-fr-in-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")
Thank you,

Gary
| [To unsubscribe from the Peters for Michigan email list, please click here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da988/5721a3ed/703244c8/efb64dd/26634514/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
Po Box 32072
Detroit, MI 48244 Senator Gary Peters stands up for middle-class families in Michigan and across America every day. He is fighting for quality education, increasing job growth and protecting our values. Gary is working hard to stand up to the extreme Trump agenda and turn the Senate blue, and the path to taking back Congress runs right through Michigan. Join Gary's team and show your support [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da988/5721a3ed/703244c8/efb64dc/26634514/VEsF/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peters_email?refcode=email-footer") This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da988/5721a3ed/703244c8/efb64db/26634514/VEsC/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/s/update-your-info") We believe that emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our top supporters. However, if you'd still like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da988/5721a3ed/703244c8/efb64da/26634514/VEsD/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe from our emails, click [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da988/5721a3ed/703244c8/efb64dd/26634514/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") [Donate to Gary ->](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da988/5721a3ed/703244c8/efb64dc/26634514/VEsB/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peters_email?refcode=email-footer") |

name: Heather Hargreaves
subject: The latest update from our campaign
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
body:
| | | |
---
---
The Democratic National Committee just released its newest set of qualification criteria to participate in the Democratic debate on February 7, and I wanted to share the good news with you right away: **Tom has qualified! **
People like you are building this campaign’s incredible momentum, and together, we’ll beat Donald Trump in November. clean_body: | | | | The Democratic National Committee just released its newest set of qualification criteria to participate in the Democratic debate on February 7, and I wanted to share the good news with you right away: Tom has qualified! People like you are building this campaign’s incredible momentum, and together, we’ll beat Donald Trump in November. Since Tom’s amazing performance in the January debate, I’ve seen how this team has grown and come together to support Tom and fight for what we all believe in — breaking the corporate stranglehold of our government, tackling the climate crisis head-on, and paving the path towards shared prosperity for all Americans. Now it’s time to keep pushing forward and show everyone that Tom is the best candidate to take on Trump on the economy and expose him as a fraud and failure. | Thank you for all that you’ve done so far and everything that you continue to do. name: Charles Booker
subject: I’m the only candidate who signed this pledge
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOOKER FOR KENTUCKY, LTD
body:
|
---
I’m the only candidate in the Kentucky Senate race who has signed the No Fossil Fuel Money Pledge, folks. I signed the pledge because our movement won’t leave behind hardworking Kentuckians who’ve been exploited by the fossil fuel industry. I'll always refuse the fossil fuel checks that Mitch McConnell sold us out for years ago. **_****_**[I need 34 folks from your area to sign my petition demanding to get fossil fuel money out of politics. name: Ben Salango
subject: Silver spoon billionaires need not apply
body:
I am ready to boost our economic state.

I will never stop fighting for working families, friend,
This is one of my top priorities as governor, and I have a proven track record in doing so. As Kanawha County Commissioner, I led the effort to build the Shawnee Sports Complex — a travel sports facility that brought tens of millions of dollars into the community in 2019 alone.
[**We need leaders with a proven track record — which is why I need you to pitch in $25 now to join our fight for West Virginia’s economy.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14034116/146613336/1618364644?refcode=em_mm1_011720_link1&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODgzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzlhNzExZi0wNDNhLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GXW1MML4P8_Ig42RN25QduiWKh-Uv3BNhn_ar2BNa0g=)
Let me ask you something, friend. Do you trust a silver-spooned billionaire who doesn’t pay his bills to help everyday workers?
We’re talking about the richest man in West Virginia claiming to understand what it’s like to struggle to put food on the table. **It’s ridiculous to even think about electing a leader who doesn’t even show up for work. Jim Justice is nothing but a wolf in sheep’s clothing.**
We can all agree that economic development benefits every single West Virginian across the state — **but it’s clear that Jim Justice isn’t getting the job done.**
**We need your help in spreading the message, friend. We’re just 48 hours away from our fundraising deadline, and our goal is to bring in 100 grassroots donors before time runs out. [Can we count on you to join us?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14034117/146613337/1618364644?refcode=em_mm1_011720_link2&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODgzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzlhNzExZi0wNDNhLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GXW1MML4P8_Ig42RN25QduiWKh-Uv3BNhn_ar2BNa0g=)**
We need common sense leaders prepared to improve the lives of all West Virginians, not just the wealthy and the well connected. As governor, and a common-sense Democrat, I will never give up on fighting for the issues YOU care about. **We can’t afford to have another 4 years of Jim Justice.**
**Friend, we’re counting on you to help us push our momentum forward by becoming a grassroots donor today!**
[**Will you pitch in just $25 to join our fight for West Virginia’s economy?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14034118/146613338/1618364644?refcode=em_mm1_011720_link3&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODgzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzlhNzExZi0wNDNhLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GXW1MML4P8_Ig42RN25QduiWKh-Uv3BNhn_ar2BNa0g=)
Together, we can move West Virginia forward.
Thanks for your support!
Ben Salango
| [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14034119/146613339/1618364644?refcode=em_mm1_011720_button&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODgzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzlhNzExZi0wNDNhLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GXW1MML4P8_Ig42RN25QduiWKh-Uv3BNhn_ar2BNa0g=)

name: Eugene DePasquale
subject: not slowing down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
Last weekend, my team kicked off our 2020 field efforts by knocking over 1,000 doors in our first day.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14037973/146648319/464986751?refcode=em_fr_2020.01.18_b1_ed_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2ExY2U1Yy0xMDNhLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lztdeWNaQAirzUbE67fMliTAcpljEdai_eOldQkDjeg=) Team,

Last weekend, my team kicked off our 2020 field efforts by knocking over _1,000 doors in our first day._ I’m so proud of them, and beyond grateful for their commitment to this campaign. **There’s a ton of work that needs to be done between now and Election Day, and we’re not slowing down any time soon.** Earlier this week, we set a mid-month fundraising goal so we can continue to build our efforts to reach voters across the district. My team has been working extra hard, and I would love to share with them that we were able to reach this goal.

[**We’re only $700 away, which means if 70 people donated just $10 we’d be able to close the gap and meet our goal. Can you be one of them, friend?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14037974/146648320/464986751?refcode=em_fr_2020.01.18_b1_ed_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2ExY2U1Yy0xMDNhLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lztdeWNaQAirzUbE67fMliTAcpljEdai_eOldQkDjeg=)

The more voters I talk to, the more evident it is that the people of South Central PA are ready for a change. We are going to flip PA-10 blue in November, but it’s only going to be because of the energy, commitment, and dedication of the grassroots team we’ve built here.

name: J.D. Scholten
subject: Let’s live with respect and honor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
---
Peter --

This weekend, we honor Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. and his legacy, which continues to inspire generations of Americans.

Overcoming mountains of obstacles, Dr. King led a movement inspired by peace, love, respect, and equality for all. When he saw injustices against the African American community, he didn’t complain. He didn’t lash out. He didn’t seek violence. Instead, he organized and led one of the most successful non-violent movements in the world to achieve legal equality for African Americans.

Dr. King’s mark on this country stretches across all parts of our society, but this weekend, let’s remember his clear-eyed vision of a more equal and just world. We have this opportunity to build the kind of country we aspire to together: one that unites around love, family, community, and common decency.

It starts with each of us. Remember that we are all members of this community and this shared planet. We may disagree. We may worship differently, love differently, or look differently -- but we’re all human. We can choose to be decent and kind to one another, instead of hate. We can choose to respond to divisiveness with an open heart, an open mind, and understanding. This is how we can bridge the divides in our country, heal wounds, and move forward.

It’s not always easy to do what’s right -- but it’s necessary. As you go about your plans this weekend, I ask that wherever you are, whether it’s at the grocery store, church on Sunday, the local high school basketball game, anywhere you go, show respect and heart to all.

Standing Tall for All,

J.D. Scholten

This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Have questions, concerns, or ideas? Simply reply to this email — we love hearing from supporters! You can also connect with the campaign on social media: Like us on [Facebook](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14039758/146662252/-579313244?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZmQ3MGQxNy0xNjNhLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JTDCCr2iapPvxlhjiqPXTliSkCe84isjZsIWBUqCRx4=&emci=694f293c-6d39-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&emdi=7fd70d17-163a-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&ceid=6658013) or follow the campaign on [Twitter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/14039759/146662253/-1912497674?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZmQ3MGQxNy0xNjNhLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JTDCCr2iapPvxlhjiqPXTliSkCe84isjZsIWBUqCRx4=&emci=694f293c-6d39-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&emdi=7fd70d17-163a-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f&ceid=6658013). Email is one of the most important ways we stay in touch with supporters like you, so we'd hate to see you go; but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/694f293c-6d39-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f/7fd70d17-163a-ea11-a1cc-2818784d084f?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZmQ3MGQxNy0xNjNhLWVhMTEtYTFjYy0yODE4Nzg0ZDA4NGYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JTDCCr2iapPvxlhjiqPXTliSkCe84isjZsIWBUqCRx4=&id=109918160&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) from Scholten4Iowa emails.

body:
There are a lot of reasons why MJ is the best candidate to take on and defeat Sen. Cornyn.

|

---
Peter,

There are a lot of reasons why MJ is the best candidate to take on and defeat Sen. Cornyn. Here are just a few:
1. **MJ IS TOUGH.** A combat veteran with a Purple Heart and a Distinguished Flying Cross with Valor, MJ has the grit it will take to beat a nearly two-decade incumbent. **[Help her do it>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489072d/7f51f7bc/4a9e89fa/4ef008f3/295327380/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc4MCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-one-month-out?refcode=email_20200118.1nd__780__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
2. **MJ GETS IT.** She's a working mom from a working-class family and knows what it means to work hard to put food on the table -- so she'll never sell Texans out to the special interests.
3. **MJ IS BOLD.** From becoming a pilot to taking on the Pentagon to open ground combat roles to women, she's defied expectations her whole life. **[That's how we know she can win this fight,](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489072d/7f51f7bc/4a9e89fa/4ef008f3/295327380/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc4MCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-one-month-out?refcode=email_20200118.1nd__780__&amount=10&recurring=true")** and she'll always stand up for us in the Senate.

It couldn't be clearer. MJ is the candidate who can take down Sen. Cornyn, but we need to win the primary first -- and we only have a month to do it! **Will you make a donation right now to make sure MJ has the resources to win the primary and hit the ground running to defeat Sen. Cornyn?**

name: Team Tucker
subject: Happy New Year & Happy Birthday Clarke!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Clarke Tucker for State Senate
body:
Dear friend,

All the Christmas decorations are put away, the kids are back in school, and 2020 is in full swing. I hope you and your family have had a great start to the new year.

When we launched this campaign, Clarke said he wanted to approach fundraising differently than most candidates, asking you to give early, but not often. Our goal is to raise enough to power this people-focused campaign, reach Arkansas voters, and **stay out of your inbox** as much as possible.

Now that 2020 is here, we need to hit the ground running. And we have a great opportunity to get the year started right by pitching in for Clarke on his birthday, which is this coming Monday, January 20.

Please help us start 2020 strong and celebrate Clarke's birthday by supporting this campaign and getting him back in the state legislature. You can [sign up to get involved](https://act.myngp.com/el/dhMYN_wbuMUTAeVYYLdOrGOGzpdyqwXa2edPZ4dgUUw=/uxqsIk6epPrUv72maNAqEgz0Ah8iA_YY3Oc0b863Wuc=), [make a contribution](https://act.myngp.com/el/dhMYN_wbuMUTAeVYYLdOrGOGzpdyqwXa2edPZ4dgUUw=/YUSvR4Tvsd8erujPTSZLd0f2voRXMxmPXYqNDCqseS4=), and follow our campaign on [twitter](https://act.myngp.com/el/dhMYN_wbuMUTAeVYYLdOrGOGzpdyqwXa2edPZ4dgUUw=/r7KW7bgOdpSUsdQGAo_Igt_ObIoucwbVZGYcZzgsHOk=), [instagram](https://act.myngp.com/el/dhMYN_wbuMUTAeVYYLdOrGOGzpdyqwXa2edPZ4dgUUw=/V5z2eVWicZD-VIys-r_fAOrFlIAQ2v3UJ367nkeh8XM=), and [facebook](https://act.myngp.com/el/dhMYN_wbuMUTAeVYYLdOrGOGzpdyqwXa2edPZ4dgUUw=/L6Cl0uFv1_jDrcsP-kpK1Y_oaQib09RnNaHrvkOhmas=). We are so grateful for your help and support.

Thank you! Happy New Year, and happy 39th birthday Clarke!

\--Team Tucker

We are so grateful for your help and support. Thank you! Happy New Year, and happy 39th birthday Clarke! \--Team Tucker Paid for by Clarke Tucker for State Senate Clarke Tucker for State Senate PO Box 7268 Little Rock AR 72217 United States = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =.

name: Ed Markey
subject: good morning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
# [](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfa9/693b8b0a/434434be/72de779f/2597594882/VEsH/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-em-2020?refcode=em_header")

Good morning.
I wanted to send a quick note to ask you to make a donation to my campaign before your day gets too busy. Before I ask, I want to share why your support matters so much today.
On Thursday, my Senate colleagues and I were sworn in for the impeachment trial. It was a historic and solemn day for our country, but it is one that we could not avoid in good conscience if we care about our democracy.
It is my promise that I will uphold my constitutional duty as a juror. I will seek to follow the facts wherever they lead -- recognizing that I may have to fight my own colleagues guided by Senator McConnell to get to the truth. But I believe the American people deserve answers, and the only way we will get to the truth is through a fair trial in the Senate.
No matter how long it takes, the pursuit of truth and a fair trial will be my focus. However, that means there will be less time for me to worry about fundraising during the impeachment trial. But we still have fundraising goals that we need to hit to make sure we win this race. So I'm asking for your help today.
[**Can you make a donation -- of any amount -- to my campaign today? It will go a long way for our grassroots campaign at a time when we absolutely cannot afford to fall behind on our fundraising.**](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfa9/693b8b0a/434434be/72de779e/2597594882/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMTgtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-january?refcode=em200118-full")
Thank you in advance for chipping in whatever you can afford. It means a lot to me to know that I can count on you to have my back at this critical time.
All my best,
Ed
**[DONATE](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfa9/693b8b0a/434434be/72de779e/2597594882/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAxMTgtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-january?refcode=em200118-full")**

* * *
Paid for by The Markey Committee
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfa9/693b8b0a/434434be/72de779d/2597594882/VEsC/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "http://ma.edmarkey.com/unsubscribe") if you'd like to unsubscribe. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email. To support Senator Ed Markey with a contribution, [click here](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dfa9/693b8b0a/434434be/72de779c/2597594882/VEsD/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-em-2020?refcode=em_footer").

body:

---

Friend,

Nancy Pelosi will go down as perhaps the least successful Speaker in United States history.

For MONTHS, she's repeatedly ignored the FACTS in favor of LIES and hearsay. And for what? It's been a month since the House voted to wrongfully IMPEACH the President, and now she expects the Senate to waste taxpayers' time and money even more? She's insane.

---
| _This needs to end._ The Fake News is too far gone to tell the TRUTH, so now it's up to us. The Senate will begin the Impeachment Scam Trials soon, and President Trump wants to know what YOU think about it.
---
**[Please take the Official WH 45.20 Impeachment Survey TODAY to let President Trump know what you think of this phony Witch Hunt.>>](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=7e1fe26c63352049b24d65625c739a68e8388bd15d746d1a85e7fb3cd284c17b1838cd1734ae8ae73dfa25101ac53acb220ced9afdd6aad5)**

---
**Do you agree that President Trump has done nothing wrong?**
[YES](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=7e1fe26c63352049d70d9842ed5df63d6908093984e4afa5654266e478530e74dca0aa4d284cb73073faa6f2c7e0b0a03960e9014c3749e2) [NO](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=7e1fe26c6335204919f3a8566b8fafecffc6f3c7f77bf83c2e845554677d94d1e0a46280071fc90541aba979b38fd89bb5e2fa4afe967d15)
---

The Left has become completely unhinged, and the American People are tired of it. **Even Senate Democrats are tired of it:**
_Senator Dianne Feinstein: "If it's serious and urgent, send them over. If it isn't, don't send it over."

Senator Joe Manchin: "[Democrats] should move on."

Senator Jon Tester: "I don't know what leverage we have. It looks like the cake is already baked."_
_Nancy knows this entire sham is dead in the water in the Senate,_ and that's why it took her so long to send them over - she just couldn't stand facing her **MEGA HOLLYWOOD DONORS** as the pathetic loser that she really is.

Let's show the Left what REAL Americans think of their political games. We're giving the President the first round of responses **TONIGHT.** Will he see yours?

**[Take the Official WH 45.20 Impeachment Survey IMMEDIATELY to make sure the President sees YOUR answers.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=7e1fe26c6335204961893a6b845436e7619abecfedc9a9d869e60e111c7729a2c921a7970831fa859a59c0583a0216159ffde4aa4d8c846e)**
Thank you,
Team Trump 2020 [TAKE THE SURVEY NOW](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=7e1fe26c633520493eaac0952a724e44d488a55232f5394a8edc5c6d4f27cb89914d8223e6cafa086ea44b3165f5b5264f38f3708a8541d9)

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Trump's Senate trial is now in session
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, The House officially sent the articles of impeachment to the Senate this week, where the GOP has been chomping at the bit to exonerate Trump of all wrongdoing and move on. They'd rather continue to tolerate our criminal-in-chief and further their destructive policies than take a principled stand for democracy and our Constitution. It's obvious the damage Trump is doing to this country will continue as long as he is in office \-- but surprisingly, only 46% of Americans support his removal from office. We need to hear from you immediately so we can understand in real time where engaged Democrats stand: **Should the Senate remove Trump from office?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfe1/6e9863e8/17fa74ab/1db0599f/1805518133/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/aLge_BGH") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfe1/6e9863e8/17fa74ab/1db0599f/1805518133/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/aLge_BGH") Thank you so much for standing with us in this fight. The WDTO Team [ADD YOUR NAME](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfe1/6e9863e8/17fa74ab/1db0599f/1805518133/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/aLge_BGH")

subject: full steam ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America

| I'm so grateful for you, Team.

Over the last month, this team showed the true power of grassroots organizing and mobilization.

[When the media and pundits counted us out of this race, we showed them that we're just getting started.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbab8d/134673f2/82651e9/6997409d/168777370/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhmatch?refcode=EM_FR_B1_011820_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

But we can't afford to let our momentum slow down. We're in the final stretch until the first ballots are cast, and we need to ensure that we have all the resources possible to see us across the finish line.

[A group of generous donors has stepped up and offered to match every donation up to $250 until midnight TONIGHT! Make your first donation and see your support doubled >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbab8d/134673f2/82651e9/6997409d/168777370/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhmatch?refcode=EM_FR_B1_011820_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Coming from a politically diverse swing state like Colorado, I've never known an easy election.

I knew running for president would be no different. But restoring decency to our highest office is worth the fight.

We can't let this election just become bickering over empty promises and policies we can't pass. We have to ignite our base while also winning back the places we lost in 2016. We've got to make sure everyone knows they have a president who's more concerned about their kids' future than their next tweet.

That's why I'm running. I'm the only candidate who's won two elections in a purple swing state, and I know how to bring people together to make sustainable progress.

[But I can't do it alone. We've come so far, and accomplished so much together, but we have more work to do. Let's get it done!](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbab8d/134673f2/82651e9/6997409d/168777370/VEsO/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhmatch?refcode=EM_FR_B1_011820_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[Friend, if you've been waiting for the right time to chip in to my presidential campaign, now is the time! Every donation up to $250 will be doubled - and get us that much closer to surprising the doubters yet again:](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbab8d/134673f2/82651e9/6997409d/168777370/VEsP/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhmatch?refcode=EM_FR_B1_011820_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

subject: Cresco anti-McConnell signatures needed
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
I need 10,000 signatures on my emergency petition demanding McConnell give the press FULL access to the Senate impeachment proceedings >>
---
| | **BREAKING: Press BLOCKED from fully covering Senate impeachment proceedings** [I just learned McConnell is BLOCKING the press from fully covering the Senate's impeachment trial. It's shocking. I need 10,000 signatures on my emergency petition demanding FULL press access. Can I count on yours? >> ](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b731/18e32a7f/51066029/7b22692d/2487171437/VEsH/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/mcconnell-survey?source=20200118_em_pet_b1_stavbrl_all") | This is the most important ask I have ever made of you:

I just learned McConnell is SEVERELY limiting reporters from the Senate's impeachment proceedings. _**I can 't overstate how disturbing this is. **_

_[**BEFORE MIDNIGHT: I need 10,000 signatures on my emergency petition demanding McConnell give the press FULL access. This is one of the most critical moments in our country 's history. Americans have the right to see exactly how it unfolds. >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b731/18e32a7f/51066029/7b22692d/2487171437/VEsE/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/mcconnell-survey?source=20200118_em_pet_b1_stavbrl_all")_
** ** ****NAME** : **dpwillis67@gmail.com**** ** ** | **[SIGN THE PETITION >>](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b731/18e32a7f/51066029/7b22692d/2487171437/VEsF/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/mcconnell-survey?source=20200118_em_pet_b1_stavbrl_all")**
---

I don't have much time.

I just learned McConnell is SEVERELY limiting press from covering the Senate's impeachment trial.

**I can 't overstate how incredibly dangerous this censorship is. **

The right of the press to freely cover our country's elected officials is paramount -- it's a right enshrined in our Constitution.

I will not let Mitch McConnell cover up President Trump's corruption behind closed doors.

Americans deserve to watch his every move throughout these critical proceedings.

_[**I need 10,000 signatures on my emergency petition demanding McConnell give press FULL access. This is one of the most critical moments in our country 's history. Can I count on you to sign your name next to mine before midnight? >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b731/18e32a7f/51066029/7b22692d/2487171437/VEsC/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/mcconnell-survey?source=20200118_em_pet_b1_stavbrl_all")_

Thank you,

Ben Ray

|

[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b731/18e32a7f/51066029/7b226922/2487171437/VEsD/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b731/18e32a7f/51066029/7b226923/2487171437/VEsA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b731/18e32a7f/51066029/7b226920/2487171437/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b731/18e32a7f/51066029/7b226921/2487171437/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b731/18e32a7f/51066029/7b226926/2487171437/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b731/18e32a7f/51066029/7b226927/2487171437/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: Charlie Blaettler, Campaign Manager
subject: Re: Falling behind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire Jones for Congress Mondaire Jones for Congress
body:

body:
| Make sure to check this out: Friend,

Do me a favor and check out this new quote from the _Cook Political Report_ showing that we can flip Kansas' seat in the U.S. Senate: **"In private polling, Republicans have [Kris] Kobach losing to likely Democratic nominee Barbara Bollier, and Kobach leading every other Republican in a head-to-head except Pompeo."** [Can you contribute $10 or more to help us win this race?](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/314split_bb314?amount=10&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+Can+you+contribute+ask+or+more+to+help+u&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_30OP_200117_2_1&source=314_EM_FR_30OP_200117_2_1&refcode=314_EM_FR_30OP_200117_2_1") | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and split evenly between Barbara Bollier and 314 Action Fund.

[Another Amount](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314split_bb314?amount=10&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=7+-+Another+Amount&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_30OP_200117_2_1&source=314_EM_FR_30OP_200117_2_1&refcode=314_EM_FR_30OP_200117_2_1")
Kris Kobach is an extremist climate change skeptic who puts his personal political ambition before our people and headed up President Trump's commission to investigate nonexistent voter fraud.

In 2018, he ran for governor of Kansas and lost to Democrat Laura Kelly.

With Mike Pompeo out, our record-breaking first quarter, and ratings changes by _Inside Elections_ and _Cook Political Report_ , everyone around the country is realizing that we can beat him.

To be honest, it's not important what Washington inside-baseball media outlets think about this race. **As a doctor, I can tell you that all that really matters is hard evidence, what the results say on November 3rd.**

[Let's bring home a win. Will you make a donation of $10 or whatever you can afford today to help fund the largest grassroots team Kansas has ever seen?](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314split_bb314?amount=10&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=8+-+Letrsquos+bring+home+a+win+Will+you+make&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_30OP_200117_2_1&source=314_EM_FR_30OP_200117_2_1&refcode=314_EM_FR_30OP_200117_2_1")

**Now that Mitch McConnell and his allies in D.C. are on notice, we can expect a lot of outside special interests to start looking at this race.**

We know that millions of dollars will be spent trying to misrepresent who I am and what I believe.

**Use this link to give today:[https://secure.314action.org/bollier2020](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/bollier2020?amount=10&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=9+-+httpssecure314actionorgbollier2020&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_30OP_200117_2_1&source=314_EM_FR_30OP_200117_2_1&refcode=314_EM_FR_30OP_200117_2_1")**

I'm not afraid of that, because I know that I've got you on my side.

Thank you,

Barbara Bollier

To be honest, it's not important what Washington inside-baseball media outlets think about this race. As a doctor, I can tell you that all that really matters is hard evidence, what the results say on November 3rd. "" Now that Mitch McConnell and his allies in D.C. are on notice, we can expect a lot of outside special interests to start looking at this race. We know that millions of dollars will be spent trying to misrepresent who I am and what I believe. Use this link to give today: "" I'm not afraid of that, because I know that I've got you on my side. Thank you, Barbara Bollier | "" Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action.org, not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. "" 314 Action is a grassroots community of over 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country. If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can "" to make a donation.

name: Gary Peters
subject: Let me cut through the clutter, folks
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Trump-McConnell machine, but I count on support from grassroots Democrats like you, friend
body:
I've been working for Michigan families to expand access to health care, protect our Great Lakes and stand up for our state's small businesses.

---
| |
---
| | **While I 've been hard at work fighting for Michigan, my opponent has been leaning on Trump and McConnell to flood our state with millions in an attempt to buy this race. We can't let them get away with this.**
---
**[_I want to show the Trump-McConnell machine that our team of grassroots supporters is stronger than their dark money and special interests - donate $3 today and help us fight back._](https://secure.petersformichigan.%3D%3D/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk260-fr-in-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")**
---
Folks, there's been a lot about our race in the news over the last week, and I just want to come to you directly and cut through the clutter. Here are the facts:
* First, some breaking news: Our rating in the race just dropped from "Likely Dem" to "Lean Dem."
* Despite unprecedented support for our campaign, my opponent has now outraised me for two quarters in a row.
* And on top of all this, recent polling shows that our race is in a dead heat.

**While Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell have been flooding Michigan with millions to try and buy the Senate, I 've been working for Michigan families to expand access to health care, protect our Great Lakes and stand up for our state's small businesses.**
**But I don 't want to have another quarter where we get outraised. [Our opponent is bought and paid for by the Trump-McConnell machine, but I count on support from grassroots Democrats like you, friend. Can you help us start 2020 on a high note by chipping in $3 today?](https://secure.petersformichigan.%3D%3D/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk260-fr-in-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")**

---
| | [Rush another amount](https://secure.petersformichigan.%3D%3D/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk260-fr-in-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")
---
The future of the Senate could be decided here in Michigan - that's why the GOP has locked in on our race. Whatever you give today will go toward keeping Michigan blue and taking back the Senate for Democrats.
**Here 's your link to donate**: [**https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email**](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da98c/5721a3ed/7036a311/efb64ba/820977129/VEsB/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoicGV0ZXJzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGsyNjAtZnItaW4tbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiZyZWN1cnJpbmc9MSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk260-fr-in-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")

Thank you for coming through.

Gary

subject: "Shall Not Be Infringed"
body:
Kendra Horn doesn't seem to understand our constitutional rights. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/7274f2902822/calling-all-patriots-12049101?e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=7eff8ddfaa&e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [DONATE NOW](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=7b1a49a972&e=795c6d9796 "DONATE NOW")
---
| Peter, I'm going to admit something that may not be very politically correct.

I'm a proud member of the NRA.

The right to bear arms is a fundamental right guaranteed by our constitution.

And in Congress, I will defend our Second Amendment rights from liberals who seek to take our guns and control our lives.

Kendra Horn is one of the gun-grabbers aiming for our Second Amendment rights, a betrayal of Oklahoma values. She supports more federal gun control and is even funded by gun-control fanatic billionaire Mike Bloomberg.

[**Our fundamental freedoms aren't optional, and they're not for Congress to infringe upon. Will you donate $5, $10, $15, $25, or even $50 to send a message that Kendra Horn and Mike Bloomberg's sticky fingers have no place near our firearms?**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=d3ce066fbc&e=795c6d9796)
---

---
| **National Journal says this is the nation's #1 battleground district.**

AP has called Oklahoma's 5th district "a seat both parties expect to work fiercely to win in 2020.”

Decision Desk HQ has said "OK-5 is guaranteed to be one of 2020's most bitterly fought House elections."

Oklahoma's 5th district is going to be ground zero for the fight to take back the House in 2020. [**That's why we need your help.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=9fc99937db&e=795c6d9796)

[**Please contribut e $5, $10, $15, $25, or even $50 to help us take back the House for conservatives and protect the Second Amendment right of all Oklahomans.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=b1c33e24c4&e=795c6d9796)

Best,
[](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=349a401674&e=795c6d9796) \--Janet Barresi

name: Chris Jacobs
subject: Sheriff Howard Endorses Jacobs for Congress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JACOBS FOR CONGRESS [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
|
---
## **Sheriff Howard Endorses Jacobs for Congress**
_Says Jacobs was an "unsung hero" in the Fight against the NY Safe Act_ __ (Akron, N.Y.) - Standing in front of a gun show at the Newstead Volunteer Fire Company, Erie County Sheriff Timothy Howard publicly endorsed State Senator Chris Jacobs for New York's 27th Congressional District. "I am supporting Chris Jacobs for many reasons, but a major one is how I saw him perform when he was the newly elected County Clerk and the SAFE ACT was first passed," said Howard. He continued "Chris stood-up strong for the 2nd Amendment rights of our citizens under immense pressure from the Cuomo Administration. And when they illegally confiscated the firearms of an Amherst resident, Chris spoke the truth and called out what really happened," said Howard. Howard further explained, "Chris fought tirelessly as Clerk to defend the privacy rights of his pistol permit holders, denying demands from multiple groups to release the personal data of pistol permit holders -as some county clerks in other counties had done." He added, "Another Clerk may have succumbed to the pressure, Chris did not." "In the Senate, Chris has fought against legislation that would infringe on 2nd Amendment rights, such as a Democratic proposal to prohibit gun raffles at volunteer fire companies. Chris understands this gun raffle legislation would be devastating to volunteer fire houses like the one we are at today, who depend on the significant money the raffles raise and it would also infringe on law abiding citizens ability to purchase affordable firearms for hunting and personal defense," said Howard. Howard also mentioned how much Chris did as Clerk for the Veterans in Erie County, starting the "Thank A Vet" program which signed-up hundreds of area businesses to voluntarily offer discounts to veterans. Jacobs grew the Erie County "Thank a Vet" Program to be the largest of its kind in the state, saving over $1 million annually for county veterans. "Just as Chris has been a loyal ally fighting alongside me as Sheriff, I can assure you Chris will fight just as hard alongside President Trump and all the great things he is doing for our country," said Howard. Jacobs stated, "Tim is a good friend, it has been an honor to work with him as County Clerk and now in the Senate, and I am deeply honored by his endorsement," said Jacobs The 27th Congressional District is currently vacant, due to the resignation of Chris Collins who pled guilty to insider trading charges. Governor Cuomo has stated he plans to call a Special Election to fill the seat on April 28th, the date of New York's Presidential Primary election. ###
[](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/4763wLeqrEv0AsckSpx3MWDw/TTLiGs8922RpWh713mjuCJsw) [](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/hM2diLOS7ayhGJSuPTMPDw/TTLiGs8922RpWh713mjuCJsw)
* * *

name: Fox News Update via Bennet for America
subject: Speaking directly to Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Today, Michael went on Fox News to tell Donald Trump -- directly -- about his economic failures:

[_" Since I know that he gets most of his talking points from this network, I want to say while I'm on this network that the country is creating jobs at a slower pace today than when Barack Obama was president. If we were creating jobs at the same pace that we were when Barack Obama was president, we would have a million more jobs today than we do. That's the Trump jobs gap."_](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbabb6/134673f2/83b449a/699742d3/2793599109/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennetfox?refcode=EM_FR_B4_011820_SDB&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

---

Team, Michael always speaks the truth. [That's why he's the best candidate to take on Donald Trump AND WIN.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbabb6/134673f2/83b449a/699742d3/2793599109/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennetfox?refcode=EM_FR_B4_011820_SDB&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

As president, Michael will build an economy that works for everyone, not just those at the top.

[Donald Trump cares about the stock market. Michael cares about you and your children. And he'll fight for you every day.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbabb6/134673f2/83b449a/699742d3/2793599109/VEsD/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennetfox?refcode=EM_FR_B4_011820_SDB&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Gov. Gavin Newsom
subject: We're suing the president.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Governors Association
body:
| | |
---
Team -

I'm proud to say California has made serious progress fighting climate change during my term as governor.
Unfortunately, at every turn, the Trump administration has attempted to block that progress. They have gutted environmental protections and denied climate science - all to line the pockets of Big Oil.
In one of his latest attacks on the planet, Trump rolled back federal greenhouse gas standards - and even revoked CA's authority to regulate auto emissions. If the president thinks he can stop the states from taking action on climate change, he is dead wrong.
We need to make sure that Democrats can stand up for our environment and curb the effects of climate change - we're even suing Trump to make sure he hears us loud and clear.**But if we 're going to prevent a climate catastrophe, we need to know where our grassroots supporters stand.** The DGA's climate poll is closing at 11:59 p.m. tonight, and we still need your response:
| | **TELL US BEFORE 11:59 P.M.**
---
**Should Democrats fight climate change?**
---
| | | [YES](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MTY4NDc1NjgS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTgwMTE0MjQwNwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
| [NO](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MTY4NDc1NjgS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTgwMTE0MjQwNwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
Thanks for pushing back,

Gavin Newsom
Governor of CA
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the DGA email list, [click here](https://www.pages02.net/democraticgovernorsassoc/unsubscribe/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=16847568&spUserID=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&spJobID=MTgwMTE0MjQwNwS2&spReportId=MTgwMTE0MjQwNwS2). | | Paid for by Democratic Governors Association.
---

We're in a fight to make the government work for working people.

A fight to make big, structural change.

If -- and only if -- we fight side by side, we can beat the big banks, the fossil fuel giants, the huge pharmaceutical companies. We can beat everyone who's been rigging the rules and pulling the strings so our economy and our government only work for the wealthy and well-connected.

**I'm so grateful to have you in this fight with me. But if we're going to win, this is the moment when we need to give it our all.**

**[I wouldn't ask if it wasn't powerfully important. Please give $2, or whatever you can, to help give our campaign the resources to compete before the Iowa caucuses. If -- and only if -- we fight side by side, we can beat the big banks, the fossil fuel giants, the huge pharmaceutical companies. We can beat everyone who's been rigging the rules and pulling the strings so our economy and our government only work for the wealthy and well-connected. I'm so grateful to have you in this fight with me. But if we're going to win, this is the moment when we need to give it our all. name: Heather, TomSteyer.com
subject: Women’s rights are human rights
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
body:
| | | |
---
---
Hi friend, **We 're all focused on what will happen in this primary over the coming months, but I never lose sight of right now -- and what we are working toward.** Every day I work with passionate people who care so deeply about the future of our country, and I try not to take that for granted. I'm so proud to be on this team, and I hope you are too. Today, as thousands take to the streets to join the Women's Marches happening all over the country, I'm reminded more than ever that we have to keep this energy going. We have a long way to go to recognize full equality for women, especially for women of color, disabled women, and queer and trans women. But we have to keep this fight up, because women's rights are human rights, and human rights are women's rights. We have to keep showing up for a more progressive, inclusive future -- that's why I'm proud to stand with Tom as we work towards full reproductive justice, pay equity, a healthier planet, an ethical immigration system, and accountability in our government. Everyone on TeamTom supports each other no matter who we are, what we look like, where we're from, our gender identity, or what religion we practice. We're all here to make a positive change, and it's what unites us that matters. _**[Watch what Tom has to say and add your name if you're ready for a candidate who supports us all and fights for diversity, equality, and inclusion](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBguGO1iUd2XLcKbWoq181-2BU0fdw1MJIfvXnHkMZgmRO-2F6fXMaTOAjlqlOSwjsC6iARumK1MiWeWKiCrjF1odjt2s5vck7vNTYJY5yvCO6abVHSYwVbB8F7NX5GN1pkTIlgM5fAN3Nuh-2FwtqjAPV05mJ7JymDK6JYSbIhWWSJDmgSoYOhlJxTHKQxRLSgXYHS-2Ba-2B2DMYIoXiHhbPxXoxjays-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz4eFq9BMkyZwT1fV8gU3hTKgydBXEIdOTn-2BDH-2Bd74DFdjhI5sDqX5m3j2Jq0dMmsiczbO82olyEVycgjzXvC4nRW9il0zq5l2x0rPRGb0yfxHH3n4uSIy5ODFl3i1ez-2BTtoSUEdXpUwK2qlt6yGpgwcPM-2BhdXD0tjkJl-2BpxVE-2BP41ezR6dSOUsuGhPafclst6ZtBM98HD-2FNt7GWEYYiZCmZ2BnKKEEQ86KYuiUk31kBI2ChHHkRIYVhG81R0lQR3M-2Bai6Wsqob-2Bf0W-2BVZzwVAQv1CivTEup5S1WN9brODjKbGnRkLihb8t9-2B8TeGtho-2FFw-2FHwBjweKwInG77FQ97HDw3pUqRgnKoTDmQMYatzXwC721vKly7wUFbrRUAFEiiXJhpW7uxKjgfMJwmN2Jxzmg-3D-3D).**_ If you're marching today, I hope you stay safe (and hydrated!) -- and if you can't make it, know that there are many marching for you. We're in this together. Thank you,
Heather Heather Hargreaves
Campaign Manager
Tom 2020

clean_body: | | | | Hi friend, We 're all focused on what will happen in this primary over the coming months, but I never lose sight of right now -- and what we are working toward. Every day I work with passionate people who care so deeply about the future of our country, and I try not to take that for granted. I'm so proud to be on this team, and I hope you are too. Today, as thousands take to the streets to join the Women's Marches happening all over the country, I'm reminded more than ever that we have to keep this energy going. We have a long way to go to recognize full equality for women, especially for women of color, disabled women, and queer and trans women. But we have to keep this fight up, because women's rights are human rights, and human rights are women's rights. We have to keep showing up for a more progressive, inclusive future -- that's why I'm proud to stand with Tom as we work towards full reproductive justice, pay equity, a healthier planet, an ethical immigration system, and accountability in our government. Everyone on TeamTom supports each other no matter who we are, what we look like, where we're from, our gender identity, or what religion we practice. We're all here to make a positive change, and it's what unites us that matters. . If you're marching today, I hope you stay safe (and hydrated!) -- and if you can't make it, know that there are many marching for you. We're in this together. Thank you, Heather Heather Hargreaves Campaign Manager Tom 2020 | | | "Facebook " | "Twitter " | "Instagram " ---|---|--- | Thank you for being a part of this campaign! Coming from a politically diverse swing state like Colorado, I've never known an easy election.

I knew running for president would be no different. But restoring decency to our highest office is worth the fight.

We can't let this election just become bickering over empty promises and policies we can't pass. We have to ignite our base while also winning back the places we lost in 2016. We've got to make sure everyone knows they have a president who's more concerned about their kids' future than their next tweet.

That's why I'm running. I'm the only candidate who's won two elections in a purple swing state, and I know how to bring people together to make sustainable progress.

[But I can't do it alone. We've come so far, and accomplished so much together, but we have more work to do. Let's get it done!](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbab89/134673f2/83db03b/6997428a/2703033163/VEsHBA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhmatch?refcode=EM_FR_B2_011820_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[Friend, if you've been waiting for the right time to chip in to my presidential campaign, now is the time! Every donation up to $250 will be doubled - and get us that much closer to surprising the doubters yet again:](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbab89/134673f2/83db03b/6997428a/2703033163/VEsHBw/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhmatch?refcode=EM_FR_B2_011820_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Trump could still start a war with Iran
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, A new poll from NPR and PBS shows that Americans may be warming to Trump on Iran. While previously ABC News and Ipsos reported that 56% of Americans disapprove of Trump's handling of Iran, NPR now found that number has dropped to 49%. If Trump turns public opinion in his favor right as the Senate begins his impeachment trial, he will be emboldened to take the conflict further. We need to know what engaged Democrats think right now so that we can understand in real time what the electorate is thinking: **Do you approve of Trump's handling of Iran?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfe4/6e9863e8/17f653d0/1db059eb/2158145672/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/zQPAv3vV") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfe4/6e9863e8/17f653d0/1db059eb/2158145672/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/zQPAv3vV") Thank you, The WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdfe4/6e9863e8/17f653d0/1db059ea/2158145672/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20200118c.ND&refcode2=&refcode2=G1PCEVGqXTPTRLvyWrrn")
